intentAndPurpose.intent: Circular progress arc. Determinate variant renders an arc proportional to `value`; indeterminate renders a spinning animation. Optional center content (icon or auto percentage). 10 t-shirt sizes. Multi-accent appearance roles.

props.name: animate
props.description: Enable entry + exit animations. Default: false (opt-in). Pair with `show` for controlled visibility.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent appearance role. 'auto' resolves to 'primary'. Default: 'auto'.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: ID of element that labels this progress indicator

props.name: children
props.description: Children rendered as icon when content='icon'

props.name: content
props.description: Center content: 'none'=empty, 'icon'=render children as icon, 'text'=auto percentage label. Default: 'none'.

props.name: data-testid
props.description: Optional test hook — forwarded to the root visual container (the ring wrapper).

props.name: show
props.description: Controlled visibility. When `animate` is true, toggling `show` triggers entry or exit. Default: true.

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset — maps to spacing dimension tokens. Default: 'M'.

props.name: variant
props.description: Determinate shows arc proportional to value; indeterminate shows spinning animation. Default: 'determinate'.

animate.description: Enable entry + exit animations. Default: false (opt-in). Pair with `show` for controlled visibility.
